title: T-029 — Register MNT-001..MNT-014 in 12-Reporting dashboards_catalog (MNT §10, cross-module)
prompt:
# T-029 — Register dashboards in 12-Reporting catalog

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §10.1, §10.2 (Dashboards rejestrowane w 12-REPORTING `dashboards_catalog`), §13.1
Cross-module: 12-REPORTING-PRD.md (dashboards_catalog metadata-driven registration)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Seed metadata rows in 12-Reporting `dashboards_catalog` for all 6 P1 (MNT-001..006) + 8 P2-evolving (MNT-007..014) dashboards. P1 rows active; P2 rows status='evolving' (rendered but disabled). Provides the entry-point map for dashboard discoverability in Reporting hub.

## Pre-flight
Verify 12-Reporting `dashboards_catalog` table exists. If 12-Reporting module has NOT been bootstrapped, this task is BLOCKED — escalate; otherwise idempotent seed.

## Implementation contract
1. Seed migration `packages/db/migrations/NNNN_maintenance_dashboards_catalog_seed.sql` inserting 14 rows into `dashboards_catalog` per PRD §10.1/§10.2:
   - MNT-001 MWO Worklist (Technician view), MNT-002 PM Schedule Calendar, MNT-003 Calibration Health, MNT-004 Spare Parts Stock Status, MNT-005 Equipment Health (MTBF/MTTR), MNT-006 Maintenance Manager Overview — all status='P1_active'.
   - MNT-007..014 (8 P2 dashboards) — all status='P2_evolving'.
2. Each row carries: `dashboard_id` (e.g., 'mnt-001'), `module='maintenance'`, `title`, `description`, `route` (e.g., '/maintenance' for MNT-001..006 dashboard cluster + per-dashboard anchors), `required_permission`, `data_source` (table or MV name), `marker` ([UNIVERSAL]/[EVOLVING]).
3. Migration is idempotent: `ON CONFLICT (dashboard_id) DO NOTHING`.
4. Vitest covering: 14 rows after migration; required_permission column is non-empty for all rows; P2 rows have status='P2_evolving'; re-run is no-op.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_maintenance_dashboards_catalog_seed.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/maintenance-dashboards-catalog-seed.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration runs, when SELECT FROM dashboards_catalog WHERE module='maintenance' executes, then 14 rows are present.
2. Given the 6 P1 rows, when inspected, then status='P1_active'; given 8 P2 rows, then status='P2_evolving'.
3. Given each row, when required_permission column is read, then it is non-empty (matches `mnt.*` perms from T-001).
4. Given migration re-runs, when checked, then ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING and no error.

## Test strategy
- RED: maintenance-dashboards-catalog-seed.test.ts asserting all four ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test maintenance-dashboards-catalog-seed`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not modify dashboards_catalog schema — 12-Reporting owns it.
- Do not seed if 12-Reporting catalog table absent — BLOCK and escalate.
- Do not write Reporting dashboards UI here — 12-Reporting task.
- Do not register dashboards with missing required_permission (would break RBAC discoverability).
